title: Payment service DB timeouts — connection pool exhausted
root_cause: Connection pool limit (10) hit after deploy of v2.3.0 introduced a connection leak in PaymentRepository. Connections were opened but not closed in the catch block.
resolution: Rolled back to v2.2.9, increased HikariCP pool size from 10 to 50, added connection leak detection plugin, added null check in catch block

title: Auth service Redis cache failure causing login latency spike
root_cause: Redis instance hit maxmemory limit (8GB), began evicting session keys using volatile-lru policy. All evicted sessions caused DB fallback lookups, saturating auth DB.
resolution: Increased Redis maxmemory to 12GB, changed eviction policy to allkeys-lru, restarted Redis cluster with graceful takeover

title: Recommendation engine OOM — heap exhaustion after model update
root_cause: New ML model v4.2 loaded all 2.1M feature vectors into FeatureCache at startup (eager loading). JVM heap (4GB) exhausted within 8 minutes. GC unable to collect cached objects due to static references.
resolution: Rolled back model to v4.1, implemented lazy loading strategy, increased JVM heap to 8GB, added cache eviction with 500MB limit

title: Checkout service regression after deploy v3.1.0
root_cause: NullPointerException at CheckoutController.java:142. PromoCodeValidator.validate() called without null check when cart has no promo code. Introduced in v3.1.0 feature branch.
resolution: Immediate rollback to v3.0.9. Hotfix deployed as v3.1.1 with null guard: if (promoCode != null) { validator.validate(promoCode); }

title: Notification service failure — email provider regional outage
root_cause: Sendgrid experienced a regional outage in us-east-1 for 4 hours. Notification service had no fallback channel configured. Queue depth grew to 42,180 messages.
resolution: Activated SMS-only fallback mode, paused non-critical notification types, drained queue over 4 hours as provider recovered. Added fallback provider configuration post-incident.

title: Payment service slow queries after DB schema migration
root_cause: Migration v20250210 dropped and recreated the transactions table index on created_at. The concurrent index creation script failed silently, leaving the column unindexed. Full table scans on 50M row table.
resolution: Created missing index: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_transactions_created_at ON transactions(created_at, service_id). Query times restored to < 50ms.

title: Auth service JWT secret rotation broke token validation for 30 minutes
root_cause: JWT secret rotated in HashiCorp Vault but application config not updated atomically. Existing tokens signed with old secret rejected. 30-minute window of auth failures.
resolution: Deployed dual-key validation (accept old + new secret for 1 hour grace period). Updated secret rotation runbook to include config update step.

title: Checkout service CPU spike — infinite loop in discount calculation
root_cause: Discount rule PROMO_COMBO_BUY2_GET1 referenced PROMO_SEASONAL_20 which referenced PROMO_COMBO_BUY2_GET1 creating a circular reference in DiscountEngine rule evaluation graph.
resolution: Emergency pod restart. Hotfix added cycle detection in DiscountEngine (DFS with visited set). Broken rule combination removed from DB.
